summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Korean info-secretary app updates: category name change to '청년 혜택/복지', new welfare sources integration, and gender/age/residence profile fields for personalized benefits
passed_tests: Backend: All 25 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Gender/age/residence fields saved and retrieved correctly for youth_benefits category
Backend: All 7 sources present including 4 new welfare sources (온통청년, 잡아바, 경기청년포털, 복지로)
Backend: Welfare scraping integration working (13 welfare articles found in feed refresh)
Frontend: Category name correctly displays as '청년 혜택/복지'
Frontend: Welfare profile section appears when youth_benefits category selected
Frontend: All profile input fields present and functional (gender, age, residence)
Frontend: Profile badges displayed correctly on saved interest cards
Frontend: All 7 sources displayed on sources page
Frontend: Welfare sources appearing in dashboard feed (잡아바, 경기청년포털, 복지 뉴스)
Frontend: Feed refresh working with 28 total articles including welfare sources
